mega_bear.narrative: Vyvanse cliff steeper; Entyvio biosim threat 2027; Takhzyro vs Andembry; pipeline misses
events: X Entyvio biosim threat (Tabilumab biosim Ph3)
X Takhzyro share loss to Andembry oral pKal

bear.narrative: Steady Entyvio + Takhzyro; PDT segment growth; pipeline mixed

base.narrative: Entyvio $7B+; Takhzyro $2.5B; PDT $5B; Zasocitinib + soticlestat + TAK-755 approved 2026-27
events: V Entyvio $7B+ peak across UC + CD
V Zasocitinib (TAK-279) approved PsO; competitor to Sotyktu
V Fruzaqla mCRC ramp $1B+; Qdenga global launch

bull.narrative: Zasocitinib best-in-class TYK2; Entyvio $9B; Takhzyro extends; Soticlestat blockbuster Dravet/LGS
events: V Zasocitinib captures 30% of TYK2 + IBD share
V TAK-755 expands to acquired TTP

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Multi-franchise dominance; Entyvio + Takhzyro + Zasocitinib + Soticlestat each $3B+
events: V Multi-asset franchise; full pipeline approved

lastData.title: FY2025 Total Revenue JPY 4.58T / ~$30.5B (+3% cc, -3% reported); Growth & Launch JPY 2.2T (+15% cc) offsetting Vyvanse cliff. Pipeline: TAK-279 + soticlestat + TAK-755 + mezagitamab.
points: FY2025 (Apr 2025-Mar 2026) Total Revenue JPY 4.58T (~$30.5B at JPY/USD 0.0067)
Growth & Launch Products JPY 2.2T (48% of revenue, +14.7% cc)
TAK-755 (rADAMTS13) BLA filed Q3 2025; cTTP first-in-class PDUFA H2 2026
Zasocitinib (TAK-279) oral TYK2 Ph3 ZENITH PsO + PsA + IBD 2026 readouts
Mezagitamab (TAK-079) anti-CD38 ITP Ph3 + IgAN + AIHA Ph2
Shire $62B Jan 2019 acq still de-leveraging (~JPY 4T net debt)

nextCatalyst.title: TAK-755 cTTP PDUFA + Zasocitinib ZENITH PsO + Soticlestat SKYWAY LGS
thresholds: H2 2026: Zasocitinib ZENITH PsO Ph3 readout (vs Sotyktu)
H2 2026: Soticlestat SKYWAY LGS Ph3 readout

risks: Entyvio biosim 2027+ (Bio-Thera + Celltrion vedolizumab biosim Ph3 ongoing)
Takhzyro vs Andembry (donidalorsen Ionis ASO 2025 launch) + Orladeyo oral
Soticlestat: SKYLINE Dravet primary missed 2024; SKYWAY LGS uncertain
Plasma-derived therapies competition from CSL Behring + Grifols
